zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Danvers於1405年出生在英國奧可福爾時，她的父親John d'Anvers II23歲，母親Alice Verney21歲。她於1427年與Thomas Baldington結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1478年6月11日在英國賀特福爾布洛布恩享年73歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 巴沙洛繆 馮 雷斯。

nameMeanings.name: Danvers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): of Norman origin, a habitational name with fused preposition d(e) for someone from Anvers, the French name of the port of Antwerp in what is now Belgium.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Danvers was born in 1405, in Oxfordshire, England, her father, John d'Anvers II, was 23 and her mother, Alice Verney, was 21. She married Thomas Baldington in 1427. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 11 June 1478, in Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in London St Bartholomew the Less, Middlesex, England.

Elle a épousé Thomas Baldington en 1427. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 juin 1478, à Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à London St Bartholomew the Less, Middlesex, Angleterre.

ko.London St Bartholomew the Less, Middlese: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 바토롬w 테 레스
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Danvers(이)가 1405년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John d'Anvers II(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Verney(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1427년 Thomas Baldington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 6월 11일 영국 허트퍼드실르 브록스보우른에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 바토롬w 테 레스에 묻혔다.

pt.London St Bartholomew the Less, Middlese: London St Bartholomew the Less, Middlesex, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Danvers nasceu em 1405, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John d'Anvers II, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alice Verney, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Baldington em 1427. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de junho de 1478, em Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em London St Bartholomew the Less, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.London St Bartholomew the Less, Middlese: лондон ст бартоломю т лесс, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Danvers родилась в 1405 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John d'Anvers II было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Verney, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Baldington в 1427 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 11 июня 1478 г. в местности броксбурн, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности лондон ст бартоломю т лесс, миддлесекс, Англия.
